mapper.select: SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, r.winner_entry_id AS result_winner_entry_id, a1.icon_path AS player1_icon, a2.icon_path AS player2_icon, CASE WHEN r.match_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_result FROM match_game m JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN player_account a1 ON e1.account_id = a1.id LEFT JOIN player_account a2 ON e2.account_id = a2.id LEFT JOIN match_result r ON m.id = r.match_id WHERE m.round_id = #{roundId} ORDER BY m.table_number ASC

SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, r.winner_entry_id AS result_winner_entry_id, a1.icon_path AS player1_icon, a2.icon_path AS player2_icon, CASE WHEN r.match_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_result FROM match_game m JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN player_account a1 ON e1.account_id = a1.id LEFT JOIN player_account a2 ON e2.account_id = a2.id LEFT JOIN match_result r ON m.id = r.match_id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, r.winner_entry_id AS result_winner_entry_id, a1.icon_path AS player1_icon, a2.icon_path AS player2_icon, CASE WHEN r.match_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_result FROM match_game m JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN player_account a1 ON e1.account_id = a1.id LEFT JOIN player_account a2 ON e2.account_id = a2.id LEFT JOIN match_result r ON m.id = r.match_id WHERE m.player1_entry_id = #{entryId} OR m.player2_entry_id = #{entryId}
SELECT m.* FROM match_game m JOIN tournament_round r ON m.round_id = r.id WHERE r.tournament_id = #{tournamentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_game (round_id, table_number, player1_entry_id, player2_entry_id, is_bye) VALUES (#{roundId}, #{tableNumber}, #{player1EntryId}, #{player2EntryId}, #{isBye})

INSERT INTO match_game (round_id, table_number, player1_entry_id, player2_entry_id, is_bye) VALUES
(#{item.roundId}, #{item.tableNumber}, #{item.player1EntryId}, #{item.player2EntryId}, #{item.isBye})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, e1.account_id AS player1_account_id, e2.account_id AS player2_account_id, r.winner_entry_id AS result_winner_entry_id, tr.tournament_id, CASE WHEN r.match_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_result FROM match_game m JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN match_result r ON m.id = r.match_id JOIN tournament_round tr ON m.round_id = tr.id JOIN entry me ON (m.player1_entry_id = me.id OR m.player2_entry_id = me.id) WHERE me.account_id = #{accountId} AND (r.match_id IS NOT NULL OR m.is_bye = 1) ORDER BY tr.tournament_id ASC, tr.round_number ASC
